Fiber.description: A bundle of soft fiber, highly useful.
Fiber.flavorText: Fiber is collected from bast, the strong inner bark of certain flowering plants.

Fur.description: One of nature\'s more perfect insulation materials.
Fur.flavorText: Fur remains an exceptional material, especially in the terrazone, where temperatures are significantly cooler.

Flint_Arrow.description: Flies further, hits harder than stone or bone.
Flint_Arrow.flavorText: Knappable flint provides a sharper arrowhead and greater penetration than stone or bone.

Fur_Head.description: Heavy, warm and moderately protective headgear.

Fur_Chest.description: An armored fur jacket, giving warmth and reasonable damage protection.

Fur_Feet.description: Heavily insulated fur boots, offering moderate physical protection.

Fur_Arms.description: Heavy fur gloves, extremely warm with moderate physical protection.

Fur_Legs.description: Heavy, strengthened fur leg armor, warm and moderately protective.

Fire_Arrow.flavorText: \'One of the good things about being this far from Earth, there\'s no-one to tell you not to play with fire.\' - Sol Berlinski

Flare_Arrow.description: Projects your position into the sky.
Flare_Arrow.flavorText: The lost among us lean heavily on this launchable marker.

Flashlight.description: An LED flashlight for illuminating dark corners. Can be recharged in a Charging Station.

Fabricator.flavorText: Surprisingly simple for such a versatile machine, the Fabricator combines a flatbed CNC router with limited 3D alloy printing capabilities.

Frag_Grenade.flavorText: Homemade explosives are the best kind.

Frag_Grenade_Impact.description: A fragmentation grenade that will explode on impact.

Fireplace.description: Cooks food swiftly and safely. Basically a large enclosed firepit, for a more homely feel.
Fireplace.flavorText: On Icarus, fire is both friend and foe.

FireExtinguisher.description: A canister of compressed flame-extinguishing liquid. Refill using water devices.

FireWhacker.flavorText: Discovered in prehistory, the fire whacker represents an effective, if unsophisticated tactic: Attack the flames until they surrender.

Fireplace_Chimney_Ext.flavorText: \'Sometimes it felt like I had joined a rustic interior decoration cult\' - M. Le Baroni

Fireplace_Chimney_Cap.description: The final step in a fireplace.

Fireplace_Chimney_Cap_Half.description: The final half-sized step in a fireplace.

Food_Bread.description: Wholesome, filling and slow to spoil.

Food_Flatbread.flavorText: Simple to bake and easy to store, boosts health and stamina regen.

FirePit.description: A large, stone-lined pit for swift cooking and heating.
FirePit.flavorText: Flashroast a steak or an entire mammoth forequarter.

Faction_Mission_Drill.description: A portable, heavy duty boring rig powered by biofuel.
Faction_Mission_Drill.flavorText: Driven by bio-diesel, this micro-derrick design was adapted from asteroid mining equipment used in the early 22nd century.

FactionMission_Tech1.description: Element from an experimental Larkwell Martinez device.
FactionMission_Tech1.flavorText: Some sort of signal or force transmitter.

FactionMission_Tech2.description: Element from an experimental Larkwell Martinez device.

FactionMission_Tech3.description: Element from an experimental Larkwell Martinez device.

FactionMission_TechRecombined.flavorText: While the precise operation of this Larkwell Martinez prototype is confidential, general specifications suggest it uses the mass-distorting effects of exotic matter to generate a diametric field intended to dampen local gravitic influence.

Faction_Mission_AquaScanner.description: A multi-purpose water monitoring, sampling and analysis station.
Faction_Mission_AquaScanner.flavorText: Hydrology is an often overlooked, but critical discipline, foundational to an astonishing array of scientific endeavor.

Food_Corn_Soup.description: A classic dish, even without shredded chicken.
Food_Corn_Soup.flavorText: Boosts stamina and improves endurance. Drains nostalgia.

Food_Fruit_Salad.description: An all-natural, surprisingly delicious melon-berry mix, boosts stamina and health.
Food_Fruit_Salad.flavorText: A divisive dessert, loved or hated, and very little in between.

Food_Mushroom_Soup.description: A passable impression of a classic dish.
Food_Mushroom_Soup.flavorText: While some critics regard this meal as pointless if made without butter, purists do not last long on Icarus.

Food_Wild_Salad.description: Mixed pieces of squash and pumpkin at room temperature.
Food_Wild_Salad.flavorText: At home among the stars, yet no closer to answering the age old question: \'What is a salad, exactly?\'

Food_Meat_Stew.flavorText: Some foods profit from rustic conditions. Boosts health, lifts stamina.

Food_Fried_Soy_Beans.description: Boosts health, lifts stamina, enhances self-satisfaction.
Food_Fried_Soy_Beans.flavorText: One of the original crops intended to sustain humanity on its first new extra-solar world.

Food_Fish_Dish.description: A simple curry with a large health boost.
Food_Fish_Dish.flavorText: Not the best fish curry in the galaxy, but far from the worst.

Food_Creamed_Corn.description: Pureed corn, animal fat and water, easy to digest.
Food_Creamed_Corn.flavorText: Slow release energy with a baby-food consistency, boosting health and stamina.

Food_Roasted_Vegetables.description: A melange of cooked vegetables, provides a serious stamina boost.

Food_Fruit_Pie.description: Watermelon plus berries and pastry creates a passable, stamina boosting pie.

Food_Meat_Pie.description: A rustic pie that delivers a big health boost.
Food_Meat_Pie.flavorText: "Stress cannot exist in the presence of a pie." - David Mamet

Food_Vegetable_Pie.description: Warm, health-giving, stamina-boosting - virtue in every pie.
Food_Vegetable_Pie.flavorText: If this pie had a slogan, it might be \'Stay delicious\'.

Food_Pumpkin_Bread.description: A noticeably yellow loaf that significantly increases endurance.

Food_Crumbed_Fish_Fillet.description: Battered in breadcrumbs, lightly fried, boosts health and stamina.

Food_Pickled_Carrot.flavorText: Like many other ancient ways, pickling has found a place on Icarus.

Faction_Mission_Radar.flavorText: This inverse synthetic aperture radar was manufactured by Larkwell Martinez, a leading defense contractor with deep ties to the ACS.

Faction_Mission_Laser.description: A high intensity strontium vapor laser prototype.
Faction_Mission_Laser.flavorText: Exactly why Group 15 had experimental weapons grade laser equipment lying around is anyone\'s guess.

Faction_Mission_WallDrill.description: An industrial-grade, portable electric mining rig designed for horizontal aperture drilling.
Faction_Mission_WallDrill.flavorText: This micro-derrick rig was adapted from Inaris-designed asteroid mining equipment used in the early 22nd century.

Farmers_Shotgun.description: A crude shotgun hastily pulled together
Farmers_Shotgun.flavorText: A basic addition to your arsenal

Fatty_Tbone.description: The largest of steaks can typically only be found in the largest of creatures

Fatty_Tbone_Dried.description: A large, fatty piece of dried meat

Fatty_Tbone_Cooked.description: A fiercely won, delicious steak dinner

Faction_MIssion_Analyzer.description: Advanced biofuel unit for accelerated production.
Faction_MIssion_Analyzer.flavorText: An upshot of the Climate Emergency was a focus on efficient, sustainable technology that squeezes every ounce of energy from nature.

Faction_Mission_Frozen_Mammoth_Sample.description: A sample from a thawed out Mammoth
Faction_Mission_Frozen_Mammoth_Sample.flavorText: It\'s still slightly cool to the touch

Food_Trough.description: A basic trough to provide food for juvenile and tamed creatures. Accepts most fresh fruits and vegetables.

Feet_Legs_Attachment_Movement_Bonus_1.description: An attachment that improves swimming and climbing speed, and reduces jumping stamina cost.
Feet_Legs_Attachment_Movement_Bonus_1.flavorText: Can be equipped to feet or legs armor at an Alteration Bench.

Feet_Legs_Attachment_Movement_Bonus_2.description: An attachment that greatly improves swimming and climbing speed, and greatly reduces jumping stamina cost.
Feet_Legs_Attachment_Movement_Bonus_2.flavorText: Can be equipped to feet or legs armor at an Alteration Bench.

Feet_Arms_Attachment_Fall_Resistance_1.description: An attachment that reduces falling damage taken and chance to receive a sprain.
Feet_Arms_Attachment_Fall_Resistance_1.flavorText: Can be equipped to feet or hands armor at an Alteration Bench.

Feet_Arms_Attachment_Fall_Resistance_2.description: An attachment that greatly reduces falling damage taken and chance to receive a sprain.
Feet_Arms_Attachment_Fall_Resistance_2.flavorText: Can be equipped to feet or hands armor at an Alteration Bench.

Feet_Body_Legs_Attachment_Stealth_Moveme.description: An attachment that reduces the threat while stealth and improves crouched movement speed.
Feet_Body_Legs_Attachment_Stealth_Moveme.flavorText: Can be equipped to feet, chest or legs armor at an Alteration Bench.

Feet_Body_Legs_Attachment_Stealth_Moveme.description: An attachment that greatly reduces the threat while stealth and greatly improves crouched movement speed.
Feet_Body_Legs_Attachment_Stealth_Moveme.flavorText: Can be equipped to feet, chest or legs armor at an Alteration Bench.

Fortification_Wood_Wall.description: A large, strong wood wall fortification.
Fortification_Wood_Wall.flavorText: Claim your territory through the wonders of construction.

Fortification_Wood_Spikes.description: A large collection of spiked defenses which can be mounted to fortification walls.
Fortification_Wood_Spikes.flavorText: An extra layer of defense, prevents wildlife from working their way through your walls.

Fortification_Wood_Gate.description: A large, strong wood gate fortification which can be opened and closed.
Fortification_Wood_Gate.flavorText: From safety to wilderness, an entryway to the danger of Icarus.

Fortification_Wood_Walkway.description: A walkway and ramp set for the wood fortification walls.
Fortification_Wood_Walkway.flavorText: A protected vantage point to survey the nearby area.

Food_Hearty_Salad.description: Gives a boost to health and stamina.

Food_Pickled_Tomato.description: Increases stamina, health regeneration, and shared XP.

Food_Potato_Carrot_Fries.description: Delivers a wide range of health benefits.

Food_Potato_Bread.description: Improves stamina and keeps you fuller for longer.

Food_Shepherds_Pie.description: An all rounder, this will keep you going.

Fish_Chunks.description: A pile of roughly diced fish.

Fishing_Bench.description: A place to craft Rods and Lures and to fillet Fish that you\'ve caught.

Filletting_Station.description: A place to craft Rods and Lures and to fillet Fish that you\'ve caught.

Fish_Wall_Mount.description: You may display your favourite catch here for all to see.

Freshwater_Fish_Fillet.description: A neatly trimmed fillet ready for cooking.

Fish_01.description: A common freshwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_01.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_15.description: An extremely rare specimen found only in the Styx Region. Native to Icarus. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_15.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_16.description: An extremely rare specimen found only in the Olympus Region. Native to Icarus. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_16.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_17.description: Unique to the Prometheus region, these fish can only be found in the Sulfur Pools of Volcanic areas.
Fish_17.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_17_Var2.description: Unique to the Prometheus region, these fish can only be found in the Sulfur Pools of Volcanic areas.
Fish_17_Var2.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_17_Var3.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_17_Var4.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_18.description: An uncommon, saltwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_18.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_19.description: A common, freshwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_19.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_19_Var2.description: A common, freshwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_19_Var2.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_19_Var3.description: A common, freshwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_19_Var3.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_19_Var4.description: A common, freshwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_19_Var4.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fiber_Lure.description: A basic lure carefully crafted out of fiber, to attract more fish.
Fiber_Lure.flavorText: Surely you\'ll catch a big one with this in your kit.

Fried_Chunky_Vegetables.description: These veges are deep-fried until crispy and golden.
Fried_Chunky_Vegetables.flavorText: Another great meal from your Potbelly Stove.

Fruit_Muffin.flavorText: A delicious meal made on your Biofuel Stove.

Fried_Fish_Chunks.description: An easy snack for the hungry prospector who\'s short on time.
Fried_Fish_Chunks.flavorText: Not as fancy as a fillet, but just as filling.

Fish_Chunk_Stew.description: A hearty and flavorful soup made with tender chunks of fish and vegetables in a rich and savory broth.
Fish_Chunk_Stew.flavorText: Chop \'em up, cook \'em up, eat \'em up.

Freshwater_Fillet_Curry.description: A spicy and aromatic dish made with tender pieces of fish cooked in a rich and creamy sauce with a blend of herbs and spices.
Freshwater_Fillet_Curry.flavorText: Spend the time on the sauce and reap the rewards.

Fish_Fillet_Pie.description: A comforting and hearty dish made with a creamy filling of mixed fish and vegetables.
Fish_Fillet_Pie.flavorText: Stuffed to the brim with fish.

Frozen_Ore.description: A chunk of frozen ore, must be heated to identify and use.
Frozen_Ore.flavorText: Avoid direct contact with eyes and/or skin.

Farming_CropPlot_T2_v2.description: A general-purpose planter bed for your crops. Fully-grown crops left too long will eventually wither and only provide spoiled plants.
Farming_CropPlot_T2_v2.flavorText: A raised planting bed brings the food to you, slowly.

Farming_CropPlot_T3_v2.description: A sturdy option for farming with water intake for faster crop growth. Fully-grown crops left too long will eventually wither and only provide spoiled plants.
Farming_CropPlot_T3_v2.flavorText: Can be connected to a water network

Farming_CropPlot_T4_v2.description: An advanced option for the busy farmer. Supports inputs from both Power and Water networks for increased crop growth speed. Fully-grown crops left too long will eventually wither and only provide spoiled plants.
Farming_CropPlot_T4_v2.flavorText: Can be connected to both a water and a power network

Farming_CropPlot_Workshop.description: Currently the best option for a farmer on Icarus. It uses a mix of nutrient dense mist and rich soil to promote growth and yield.
Farming_CropPlot_Workshop.flavorText: Can be connected to both a water and a power network

Food_Seed_Bread.flavorText: Better for you than white bread... doesn\'t taste quite as good.

Food_Seed_Cracker.flavorText: This cracker resembles hardtack. Upholding the explorers tradition of terrible snack choices.

Food_Berry_Bar.description: Full of energy for long hikes.
Food_Berry_Bar.flavorText: Tastes much better than seed crackers.

Food_Animal_Feed.flavorText: Seed feed to satiate your creatures needs.

Farmers_Backpack.description: A handy backpack to cover all your farming needs.
Farmers_Backpack.flavorText: Spray the weeds and keep the seeds

Frozen_Wool.description: A patch of frozen wool taken after battle with a fearsome creature.

Food_Animal_Feed_Speed.flavorText: Seed feed to satiate your creatures needs.

Food_Animal_Feed_CarryWeight.flavorText: Seed feed to satiate your creatures needs.

Food_Honey_Bar.description: A sweet and tasty snack for your travels.

Flame_Thrower.description: A biofuel powered device which ejects fuel and ignites it when thrown. This can be filled in a composter.
Flame_Thrower.flavorText: Sure beats a can of aerosol and a lighter.

Food_Trough_Large.description: A basic wooden feeder that allows multiple creatures to eat from at once
Food_Trough_Large.flavorText: Like the smaller one, only larger

Food_Trough_T4.description: A feeder which can create different types of animal gruel depending on what is placed inside.
Food_Trough_T4.flavorText: Takes the pressure out of cooking.

Food_Trough_Rustic.description: A Rustic looking feeder that allows multiple creatures to eat from at once
Food_Trough_Rustic.flavorText: For animals that like that rustic look.

Food_Trough_Metal.description: A Metal feeder that allows multiple creatures to eat from at once
Food_Trough_Metal.flavorText: Perfect for when you need to feed a lot of animals, fast.

Food_Trough_Glass.description: A Glass feeder that allows multiple creatures to eat from at once
Food_Trough_Glass.flavorText: A feeder with a little bit of class.

Flow_Meter.description: Connect this to any resource network for a breakdown of flow rates and devices.

Food_Animal_Feed_High_Quality.description: Created in the Ranching Station. When fed to animals, increases food effectiveness and provides all-round bonuses.

Fried_Chicken.flavorText: Reminds you of old earth fast food chains.

Food_Animal_Feed_Squash.description: A feed that will help animals survive desert environments.

Food_Animal_Feed_Pumpkin.description: A feed that will help animals survive arctic environments.

Food_Animal_Feed_Potato.description: A feed that will help animals survive volcanic environments.

Food_Animal_Feed_Corn.description: A feed that promotes long distance travel.

Food_Animal_Feed_Carrot.description: A feed that promotes short and fast travel.

Food_Animal_Feed_Mushroom.description: A feed that promotes rough terrain and rocky traversal.

Food_Animal_Feed_Bean.description: A feed that promotes defence and survival.

Frozen_Kiwi.description: A Kiwi preserved in a cryogenic stasis that can be deployed and defrosted on planet.

Fruit_Snack_Pack.description: A fresh fruit snack pack, good for long trips.
Fruit_Snack_Pack.flavorText: Just like the ones that kids have.

Flagpole.description: A Flag Pole with flag, made to withstand harsh conditions.

FieldGuide_Character.description: Characters can craft basic equipment necessary for survival.

FieldGuide_Biofuel.description: Biofuel is used in a variety of equipment.

FieldGuide_Oxygen.flavorText: The suit protects prospectors from cyanide in the atmosphere.

FieldGuide_Water.description: Water is used for basic survival and advanced machinery.

FieldGuide_Electricity.description: Electricity is used for advanced machinery.

FieldGuide_PyriticCrust.description: A heavily scarred stone with traces of metal and minerals. Use the Organic Residue Cleanser to gain various ores based on source. Toxic to humans, this will damage you when carried.
FieldGuide_PyriticCrust.flavorText: The UDA has issued an Icarus-wide health warning regarding this material. Use at your own risk.

Frozen_Wood.description: Frozen Wood drilled from an old root system underneath the ice.
Frozen_Wood.flavorText: Needs to be defrosted to be useful.

Faction_Mission_DownLaser.description: A high intensity strontium vapor laser prototype.
Faction_Mission_DownLaser.flavorText: Exactly why Group 15 had experimental weapons grade laser equipment lying around is anyone\'s guess.

French_Onion_Soup.description: A hearty broth topped with onions.
French_Onion_Soup.flavorText: A hug in a bowl when nights grow cold.

Flat_Solar_Panel.description: This solar panel needs to be in direct sunlight to create power. Can be placed on any flat or angled surface.
Flat_Solar_Panel.flavorText: As effective under this star as any other.

Flare_Gun.description: An Instrument which can be used to project your position into the sky.

Flare_Yellow.description: Lights up the surrounding area in a yellow light.
Flare_Yellow.flavorText: Typically used to light up environments.

Flare_Green.description: Lights up the surrounding area in a green light.

Flare_Red.description: Lights up the surrounding area in a red light.

Flare_Blue.description: Lights up the surrounding area in a blue light.

Flightless_Tank_Head.description: A preserved memory of a horned beast.
Flightless_Tank_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Flightless_Tank_Trophy.description: The mounted remains of a Sandhorn.
Flightless_Tank_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Flying_Tank_Head.description: A preserved memory of a huge beast.
Flying_Tank_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Flying_Tank_Trophy.description: The mounted remains of a Ravager.
Flying_Tank_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Fortification_Concrete_Spikes.description: Attachment for fortification walls that damage creatures who attack.

Fortification_Concrete_Gate.description: A solid gate which can be used to create a fortified encampment.

Fortification_Concrete_Walkway.description: A walkway and ramp set for the concrete fortification walls.

Fortification_Concrete_Platform.description: A wall attachment that allows you to look over the top of your wall safely.

Fortification_Stone_Spikes.description: Attachment for fortification walls that damage creatures who attack.

Fortification_Stone_Gate.description: A large, strong stone gate fortification which can be opened and closed.

Fortification_Stone_Walkway.description: A walkway and ramp set for the stone fortification walls.

Fortification_Stone_Platform.description: A wall attachment that allows you to look over the top of your wall safely.

Fertility_Serum_Chicken.description: Primes Roosters for mating. Once primed will seek out and fertilize nearby chickens.

Fertility_Serum_Cow.description: Primes Bulls for mating. Once primed will seek out and fertilize nearby Cows.

Fertility_Serum_Sheep.description: Primes Rams for mating. Once primed will seek out and fertilize nearby sheep.

Fertility_Serum_Moa.description: Primes Male Moa\'s for mating. Once primed will seek out and fertilize nearby Female Moa\'s.

Fertility_Serum_Buffalo.description: Primes Male Buffalo for mating. Once primed will seek out and fertilize nearby Female Buffalo.

Frozen_Banana.description: A preserved banana frozen into a sweet treat.
Frozen_Banana.flavorText: Cold, sweet, and surprisingly refreshing after a long haul.

Fur_Stack.description: A neatly rolled stack containing 200 Fur. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.
Fur_Stack.flavorText: Fur remains an exceptional material, especially in the terrazone, where temperatures are significantly cooler.

Fertility_Serum_Pig.description: Primes Male Pigs for mating. Once primed will seek out and fertilize nearby Female Pig.

Fertility_Serum_Raptor.description: Primes Male Raptors for mating. Once primed will seek out and fertilize nearby Female Raptor.

Fertility_Serum_Slinker.description: Primes Male Slinkers for mating. Once primed will seek out and fertilize nearby Female Slinker.

FieldGuide_RefinedOil.description: Refined Oil can be converted from Biofuel or Crude Oil.

FieldGuide_CrudeOil.description: Crude Oil is gathered from Oil Geysers.
